testcase.name: titleTest

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for title to contain "Lenskart1.com". Current title: "Lenskart.com® - Sunglasses, Contact Lens, Eyeglasses, Frames, Buy 1 Get 1 Offer for Gold Members" (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.5.3', revision: '4b786a1e430' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '12.6.1', java.version: '17.0.4.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 107.0.1, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20221128144904, moz:debuggerAddress: 127.0.0.1:36511, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.32.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 21.6.0, moz:processID: 69629, moz:profile: /var/folders/5l/cnx21f9j4yx..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:useNonSpecCompliantPointerOrigin: false, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: MAC, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://127.0.0.1:36511/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 85.0, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify} Session ID: 92b66b05-016f-4532-9bef-ce950118b478
